scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');try{fs.mkdirSync(path.join('node_modules','.prisma'),{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(path.join('..','..','node_modules','.prisma','client'),path.join('node_modules','.prisma','client'),{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(path.join('..','..','node_modules','@prisma','client'),path.join('node_modules','@prisma','client'),{recursive:true});console.log('Prisma client copied from parent');}catch(e){console.log('Could not copy prisma client:',e.message);}" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env')){fs.writeFileSync('.env','DATABASE_URL=\"file:/home/z/my-project/db/custom.db\"\n');console.log('Created .env');}"
